response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms or direct exposure to capital markets/fixed income domains, which are mandatory requirements; his C++ exposure is limited to a brief academic thesis and NI LabWindows, with no evidence of production-grade financial systems work, and his professional focus is overwhelmingly on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile stacks.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No proven C++ development on Windows in a financial context
Lacks fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server/Oracle in financial systems
